attributes.action: Scrap the Visa brakes for nationals of Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar and Sudan
attributes.additional_details: Universities will lose money because less international students will be able to enrol. International students have a significant economic and academic contribution to Universities. Residents lose the right to work making them vunerable to deportation. The fraction of these countries who are asylum seekers are very small so its inefficient to target these four countries. Myanmar and Cameroon not being in top nationalties list less than 1% with asylum claims, afghanistan with 6% and Sudan 8%.
attributes.background: Reconsider the visa brake that's imposed on the 26th of March, students that have a future are restricted because their visa will terminate due to predjudice to their nationality

rejection.details:
Remove the student visa 'emergency brake' applied to certain countries
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763938

Review the 2026 visa brake: Publish evidence & create transitional arrangements
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764063
